ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category" INTEGER /* Category the product belongs to */,
  "description_1" TEXT /* First part of the product description */,
  "description_2" TEXT /* Second part of the product description */,
  "exp_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* File path to the product image */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount percentage on the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Available quantity of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Name of the brand that manufactures the product */,
  "ingredients" TEXT /* List of ingredients used in the product */,
  "usage_instructions" TEXT /* Instructions on how to use the product */,
  "health_benefits" TEXT /* Health benefits of the product */,
  "image_gallery" TEXT /* Array of image paths for the product */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product is featured on the homepage */,
  "stock_status" TEXT /* Current stock status (e.g., in stock, out of stock) */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* Path to the category image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for account security */,
  "account_created" TEXT /* Date the account was created */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Shipping address of the user */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the user */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the user */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the user */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the user */,
  "is_subscribed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is subscribed to the newsletter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount for the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Method of shipping (e.g., standard, express) */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., paid, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item in the order */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product at the time of order */,
  "discounted_price" REAL /* Price of the product after applying any discounts */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount for the product */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the item including tax and discounts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the user */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was submitted */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "is_verified_purchase" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review is from a verified purchase */,
  "upvotes" INTEGER /* Number of upvotes the review has received */,
  "downvotes" INTEGER /* Number of downvotes the review has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discounts" (
  "discount_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discount */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product to which the discount applies */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the discount */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the discount period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the discount period */,
  "discount_code" TEXT /* Code that can be used to apply the discount */,
  "max_uses" INTEGER /* Maximum number of times the discount can be used */,
  "uses_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the discount has been used */,
  "min_order_amount" REAL /* Minimum order amount required to apply the discount */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discount_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discounts_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product in inventory */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity available in inventory */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the inventory was last updated */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Quantity at which a reorder should be placed */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder */,
  "supplier_lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for the supplier to deliver */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
